originalTitle: Oil tanker hijacked off coast of Yemen and taken towards Somalia
title: Oil tanker hijacked off coast of Yemen and taken towards Somalia
content: It is the second time an oil tanker has been hijacked in the area in the past 10 days.

originalTitle: 'This tree was planted by my ancestor hundreds of years ago and my family settled here'
title: 'This tree was planted by my ancestor hundreds of years ago and my family settled here'
content: Oral history traces a family's roots to a tree planted in the 13th Century in a Ghanaian fishing town.

originalTitle: US imposes sanctions on DR Congo ex-President Kabila alleging rebel support
title: US imposes sanctions on DR Congo ex-President Kabila alleging rebel support
content: The former leader has not responded to US accusations that he is aiming to destabilise the government.

originalTitle: Why are maritime laws failing to secure the seas?
title: Why are maritime laws failing to secure the seas?
content: Wars and territorial disputes are rewriting the rules of global shipping.

originalTitle: Timmy the humpback whale escapes to the North Sea
title: Timmy the humpback whale escapes to the North Sea
content: The whale calf's repeated stranding off the coast of Germany sparked widespread concern and extensive media coverage.

originalTitle: Spirit Airlines collapses amid rising fuel costs from war on Iran
title: Spirit Airlines collapses amid rising fuel costs from war on Iran
content: US budget carrier Spirit Airlines shuts down after talks for a government bailout failed.

originalTitle: Germany says US troop withdrawal 'foreseeable' as Nato seeks clarification
title: Germany says US troop withdrawal 'foreseeable' as Nato seeks clarification
content: In the US, two senior Republicans voice concern over President Trump's decision to pull out 5,000 troops.

originalTitle: US threatens shipping firms with sanctions if they pay Iran tolls
title: US threatens shipping firms with sanctions if they pay Iran tolls
content: The warning comes as President Donald Trump said he was "not excited" by Iran's latest proposal for a peace deal.

originalTitle: Thirteen killed in Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon, health ministry says
title: Thirteen killed in Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon, health ministry says
content: Four women and a child are among the dead, as fighting between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah continues despite a ceasefire.

title: Watch: Match of the Day
content: Highlights of five Premier League games, including title-chasing Arsenal versus Fulham.

originalTitle: Has much-maligned Gyokeres proved his critics wrong?
title: Has much-maligned Gyokeres proved his critics wrong?
content: The talk before the season was that Arsenal needed a 20-goal-a-season striker to win a trophy - and now they finally have one in Viktor Gyokeres.

originalTitle: Woodwork woe and a Spurs lifeline - West Ham suffer in survival fight
title: Woodwork woe and a Spurs lifeline - West Ham suffer in survival fight
content: Tottenham were the biggest winners as fellow Premier League strugglers West Ham hit the woodwork four times in their 3-0 defeat at Brentford.
